title_en: Introduction to The Legacy of the Prophet
content_en:
A profound work by the great Hanbali scholar Ibn Rajab al-Hanbali on the spiritual inheritance the Prophet (peace be upon him) left for his Ummah. Ibn Rajab was one of the foremost scholars of his era in hadith, fiqh, and Islamic spirituality, a student of Ibn al-Qayyim's students and a master of the Hanbali school.

Drawing from the famous hadith of Ibn Abbas in which the Prophet advised him: "Preserve Allah, and Allah will preserve you; preserve Allah and you will find Him before you..." — Ibn Rajab expands this brief but comprehensive prophetic advice into a detailed exposition of reliance on Allah, proper worship, and correct Islamic character.

The book covers the meaning of preserving the limits of Allah, total reliance on Allah (tawakkul), how to respond to hardship and ease, the relationship between a servant and his Lord, and the spiritual dimensions of everyday Islamic practice. It is considered one of the finest works on Islamic spirituality within Ahl us-Sunnah methodology.
